name: quota
description: /quota <args> — Claude account 5h/7d usage limits (read-only). Verbs: status (default · current account + live 5h/7d) · list (registered accounts) · help. Live fetch via OAuth usage endpoint with 45s cache (429 throttle). Multi-account registry at $HOME/.sidecar/quota/accounts.json — PR#2 adds /quota add, PR#3 adds /quota switch. ⚠ depends on Anthropic's non-public oauth/usage + oauth/token endpoints (ccmon idiom) — may break if Anthropic rotates them.
